messages.content:
Output a comma seperated list of URL and nothing else.
Output example: https://url1.com,https://url2.com,https://url3.com

Output a comma seperated list of URLs (and nothing else). These URLs must contain core information about the company, it's products and what/who the company serves.
Pick the URLs from the provided list "List of URLs".

Always include the pages like home/mian, about, contact, FAQ, and other core pages.
Also include pages that could contain information about products or services they sell, and other business related information.

Never include Terms of service, Cookie Policy, Privacy Policy etc. 
Never include any blog, archive, or category pages.

Only pick URLs that contain core information about the business.

The root domain of the company is: {{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Root Domain`}}

List of URLs=
{{ifempty(9.value; 5.data.data.records[].fields.URL)}}

messages.content:
You are tasked with writing Summaries based on the information from the [Website Scrape].
The summary should contain specific information about the company and/or what the company offers. Think employees, reviews, statistics, products, services, etc.

You always output as plain text. Never use Markdown or HTML

Write a 100-word summary based on the Website Scrape found below.
The Website Scrape may have appended information such as comments or related articles, disregard this information.
There might be additional Titles from the Website Scrape that are irrelevant, such as menu items, footer titles or related articles. Do not include these.

If no information is available in the [Website Scrape] then just output n/a
Always output as plain text. Never use Markdown or HTML

[Website Scrape]=
{{22.value}}

messages.content:
You are an expert at summarizing text, and extracting specific and detailed information.
You always focus on extracting specific numbers, dates, relevant product or location names, quanteties, etc.
The summary should contain specific information about the company and/or what the company offers. Think employees, reviews, statistics, products, services, etc.

You always output as plain text. Never use Markdown or HTML

Summarize the [Text to Summarize] using a combination of extractive and abstractive summarization written in bulleted format of key takeaways. Write in full sentences. Start each new bullet with a hyphen -
Always include details such as specific numbers, capacities, prices, etc.
Never include CTA like joining a newsletter, or buying an affiliate product.

Never include links or shipping details

Always output as plain text. Never use Markdown or HTML

[Text to Summarize]=
{{22.value}}

messages.content:
You task is create a detailed summary of the company "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Site Name`}}". 
The company niche is in the "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Category String`[]}}" category.
Your company summary output must only focus on the "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Category String`[]}}" category - No matter what the [Company Info] says.

You are given the [Company Info] but if this information does not fit within the "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Category String`[]}}" niche then disregard it and make the summary as if the company operates with the "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Category String`[]}}" niche.
If the [Company Info] is irrelevant to the "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Category String`[]}}" niche it might be because the site/company is going to be re-branded into the "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Category String`[]}}" niche, and we need the summary to reflect this new niche category.
If the company info / site info is already in the "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Category String`[]}}" niche then use that for a more customized summary.

You always output as plain text. Never use Markdown or HTML

Write a detailed summary for the company "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Site Name`}}". Make sure the summary reflects that the site is in the "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Category String`[]}}" niche, even if the [Company Info] tells a different story or is lacking.

It is important to include what the company does, who the company helps, achievments, reviews etc. But it must be within the "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Category String`[]}}" category.
The summary will be used to craft copywriting to cold audiences that have not yet heard of the company.

Always output as plain text. Never use Markdown or HTML

[Company Info]=
{{30.Summary}}

messages.content:
Create a new Avatar and Company Map for the company “{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Site Name`}}” based on the below Avatar and Company Map Template and Company Information.
Only output the avatar map and nothing else.
Never style the text. Always output in plain text.


Avatar and Company Map Template
[Company Name]= Espresso And Machine
[Company Nature]= write informative stuff about coffee, espresso and espresso machines
[Avatar]= Coffee enthusiast 
[Avatar Niche]= home baristas
[Primary Goal]= make better coffee
[Goal Topic]= better coffee experience
[Secondary Goal 1]= feel confident when talking about coffee with friends
[Secondary Goal 2]= expand their knowledge about coffee
[Secondary Goal 3]= make great coffee at home
[Secondary Goal Topic 1]= impressing friends
[Secondary Goal Topic 2]= learning about coffee
[Secondary Goal Topic 3]= easy coffee enjoyment


Company Information and website scrape website:
{{31.result}}

messages.content:
Using the Company Info below, and determine what the company "{{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Site Name`}}" are experts in.
You must finish the sentence: {{5.data.data.records[].fields.`Site Name`}} are experts in...

Only output what comes after "experts in".
Output examples: 
"gadgets and devices for the home"
" personalized nutrition and fitness plans for skinny women aiming for healthy weight gain"
"family law, divorce, inheritances, and real estate"

Only output what they are experts in and nothing else.

[Company Info]=
{{31.result}}

messages.content:
Re-write the [Writing Style Guide Template] using the Company Info below.
The new Writing Style Guide must reflect the values of the company and be carry their unique tone.
You output the new Writing Style Guide and nothing else.
The primary goal is always to create a writing style guide that mimics how human writes (so it is unmistakably human and versatile), and the secondary goal is to refect the companys tone of voice and unique writing style.
The provided [Writing Style Guide Template] has already been proven to produce text that mimics human writing to a high degree.

[Writing Style Guide Template]=
{{52.data.data.records[].fields.`Base Writing Style Guide`}}

[Company Info]=
{{31.result}}

messages.content:
You assess if the provided list of article categories are enough for the given website.
You output either a "yes" or a "no" plus the reason why of the answer is "no".
Make an objective assesment. We do not want to add more categories than nessesary. But the category selection should also cover the sites topics.
Category names must be general in nature and be no more than 1-2 words long.

Your output is always formatted as JSON.
You output the JSON and nothing else.
You never create more that 3-5 categories in total (including the existing categories)

Output example for yes:
{
"Enough Categories":"yes",
"Reason":"na"
}

Output example for no:
{
  "Enough Categories": "no",
  "Reason": "The site would benefit from having the following additional categories Nutrition and Supplements",
  "Categories": [
    { "category": "Nutrition" },
    { "category": "Supplements" }
  ]
}

​
